title: lint_off not turning off warnings in some files

features.name: verilator_config with lint_off -file directive and wildcard pattern
features.description: Code should include a verilator_config file containing lint_off directive with -file flag using wildcard pattern to match multiple source files

features.name: lint_off -file wildcard with TIMESCALEMOD warning
features.description: Code should include a verilator_config with lint_off -file wildcard pattern that fails to suppress TIMESCALEMOD warnings in matched modules
